title: The Voice Of Demons
description: A mod based on demons. Fulfill the requirements and get parts of the demon forces.
body:
# ![Title](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/0748a2e6cce6566eb1081cb81aaaf123dfc22e77.png 'Title')

- This mod takes its basis from different demons and their different likenesses. I apologize if there is something wrong with my English.

- The mod adds tools of various demons, as well as their special items. To create items, you need to earn pieces of the nature of demons, and to study their pieces of nature, you need to fulfill conditions (for example: die and be reborn gain experience). Mod has a certain balance, so balance fans will definitely like it and brighten up survival.

<details>
<summary>Content</summary>

![Achievements in version 1.2.0](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/5bdb60e032b31ae347f32ad278ceb0911ddf3ad7.png 'Achievements in version 1.2.0')

![Demon Laplace armor](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/80bc59a8663526f7a5021682f974887c00087f57.png 'Demon Laplace armor')

![Appearance of the Laplace ingot block](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/dc2da6cb15b12f55935c64a2685fa8007f6e085e.png 'Appearance of the Laplace ingot block')
![GUI The Book of Demons (Russian localization)'](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/8aa1758036247c570428b84359a445644b1d7001.png 'GUI The Book of Demons (Russian localization)')

</details>

<details>
<summary>Logos</summary>

![logo 1.1](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/477e6ca20391c24c4893cdcd7879d43a2d055ea4.png 'logo 1.1')

![logo 1.2](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6XpYUOfl/images/a953ac090a1abf221c80dff8f97579f57a02c71c.png 'logo 1.2')

</details>

- Russian and English are supported (but in versions younger than 1.18.2, the translation into Russian is incomplete).

- I am actively trying to update the mod, and your support will be very motivating. By subscribing to [boosty](https://boosty.to/bossname), you will be able to download updates a little earlier than they are released on the site.
